title: smilax oblongifolia
intro: Smilax oblongifolia, also known as the box huckleberry vine, is a type of evergreen climbing vine native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Smilax oblongifolia can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in teas, salves, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
